name: Time To Stop Time
short_description: A catastrophe is about to happen and you have only a limited time to prevent it. Use your time stopping powers to make the most out of what little time you have!
detailed_description:
Time To Stop Time is a first-person superhero action. You’re given the power to control time and a huge responsibility to save every innocent person from the imminent danger. There is a limited time to analyse the situation and navigate through a storm of falling debris, bullets and explosions.

Choose your own solution for each situation and find the most creative way to resolve an imminent crisis!

  • Time-frozen physics

    Change the trajectory of moving bullets to send them back. Throw and move different objects to create a path or improvised weapons.

  • Extreme surfing

    Jump on a rocket or a tank shell, turning it into an explosive hoverboard.

  • 40+ Time Sandbox Levels

    From simple bar brawls to saving the President — each level is unique and it’s up to you how to solve its puzzles.

  • Tactical kicking

    Accelerate objects or your enemies with a good kick.

  • Throw knives

    Throw multiple knives at enemies.

  • Time skip

    Move objects forward in time, send bullets straight to enemy faces!

supported_languages:
English*, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
